trigger_rules.name: lunch_suggestion
trigger_rules.direct_prompt: It's lunchtime! Based on the user's food preferences (use recall), suggest 2-3 lunch options from nearby restaurants on Swiggy Food. Include estimated delivery time and price. Send the suggestion to the user.

trigger_rules.name: grocery_restock_reminder
trigger_rules.direct_prompt: Weekly grocery check: Review the user's past grocery orders from memory (use recall for 'grocery' and 'instamart'). Suggest commonly ordered items that may need restocking — such as milk, eggs, bread, and other staples. Present a summary with estimated costs from Swiggy Instamart.
